name: Bloom Equity Partners
overview: Tech-focused lower-middle-market buyout firm. Strategy emphasizes thesis-led origination over auction-driven sourcing, which is the explicit context for the BDM job description that anchors this study plan.
bdNotes: BD function is core to the firm's origination engine — the published BDM JD lists thematic sourcing, exec/advisor outbound, and conference targeting as primary responsibilities.
